situational_context: Running comeback week 4: 4 runs completed since May 3 gap break (Run #1: 2.47 km, Run #2: 2.01 km, Run #3: 3.53 km, Run #4: 5.01 km). Pattern of exceeding prescribed distances but no injuries reported — tissue tolerance good so far. Run #5 (consolidation at ≤5 km) scheduled May 23. Primary modality remains e-bike commuting (~38 km/day round trip on sur site days). Chronic load declining (22.3 → 20.9) as April cycling sessions leave the 28d window — need sustained sessions to stabilize. ACWR at 0.78 (detraining zone), target 0.80+. HRV 7d avg 36 — right at 90-day baseline (36.4 ± 3.2), BALANCED status. RHR improved to 50 bpm (90d avg 52). Weight declining: 103.6 kg (from 104.8 at comeback start). Sleep adequate at 6.84h 7d avg. No new labs since Dec 2025. Comeback protocol active — consolidation phase at 5 km before further progression. Vitamin D retest due ~July 2026. Nutritionist appointment May 28 (Lucie UGUEN).

plan_7d_ahead.type: Sur site — eBike commute attendu (~16-20 load)

recommendations.text: Execute Run #5 tomorrow as consolidation: repeat ~5 km at easy Z1-Z2 effort. Do NOT increase distance. If any localized pain from Run #4 persists, downgrade to 3 km or skip entirely.
recommendations.measurable: Run #5 completed ≤5 km with no post-run pain lasting >24h

recommendations.text: Prioritize sleep this weekend — 7d avg has dipped to 6.84h (below 7h protocol threshold). Young baby disruptions are expected but aim for ≥7.5h when possible. Good sleep directly supports tissue adaptation during running comeback at 103.6 kg.

Prepare nutrition export (30 days) for Lucie UGUEN appointment on May 28. Protein averaging 145g/day over last 7 days — below 150g target. Discuss protein distribution strategy (0.4 g/kg/meal across 4 meals).
recommendations.measurable: Nutrition export ready by May 27; protein avg ≥150g/day this week

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if declines below 20 (currently 20.9, declining trend)
markers_to_watch.reason: April cycling sessions leaving the 28d window. Need consistent sessions to stabilize before building.
